title: Nicco Park
tagline: Nicco Park — heritage city of West Bengal

overview.short: Nicco Park is an amusement park located in Jheel Meel, Sector - IV of Bidhannagar, West Bengal, India.
overview.description: Nicco Park is an amusement park located in Jheel Meel, Sector - IV of Bidhannagar, West Bengal, India. The park was created to attract tourists to the state by providing family-friendly recreation as well as educative entertainment. Nicco Park opened on 13 October 1991 and has since been referred to as the Disneyland of West Bengal. Presently, the 40-acre park is home to over 35 different attractions and has served over 24 million customers.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nalban metro station
topPlaces.description: Nalban (Also known as Nicco Park) is a metro station of Orange Line of the Kolkata Metro. It is situated at just beside of Nicco Park.

topPlaces.name: The Chatterjee Group Centres for Research and Education in Science and Technology
topPlaces.description: The Chatterjee Group Centres for Research and Education in Science and Technology or simply TCG CREST, is a multiple cross-disciplinary educational research centre deemed-to-be-university located in Salt Lake’s Sector V, West Bengal, India. It has five schools.

image.alt: The Chatterjee Group Centres for Research and Education in Science and Technology

topPlaces.name: S. N. Bose National Centre for Basic Sciences
topPlaces.description: S. N. Bose National Centre for Basic Sciences (SNBNCBS) is an autonomous research institute dedicated to basic research in basic sciences under the Department of Science and Technology of Government of India. It is located in West Bengal, Salt Lake, Kolkata.

image.alt: S. N. Bose National Centre for Basic Sciences

topPlaces.name: National Council of Science Museums
topPlaces.description: National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) is an autonomous scientific organization functioning under the Ministry of Culture, Government of India for science communication through its network of science museums or science centres spread across India. It is the largest chain of science centers/museums under a single administrative umbrella in the world.

topPlaces.name: Bidhannagar
topPlaces.description: Bidhannagar or Salt Lake City, is a planned city in North 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal and the main IT hub of Eastern India. It is a part of the city of Kolkata and is under the municipal administration of Bidhannagar Municipal Corporation (BMC).

topPlaces.name: Salt Lake Electronics Complex
topPlaces.description: Salt Lake Electronics Complex (or, Salt Lake Electronic City) (abbr. SALTLEC) is a technology hub in the Sector V of Bidhannagar, Kolkata in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Salt Lake Stadium
topPlaces.description: The Salt Lake Stadium, Kolkata, also known as Vivekananda Yuba Bharati Krirangan (VYBK), is a multi-purpose stadium, used mostly for football matches, located in Salt Lake City, Greater Kolkata, with a capacity of 85,000 spectators. Named after Swami Vivekananda, the stadium is one of the home grounds of East Bengal FC and Mohun Bagan SG. The stadium hosted the final match of the 2017 FIFA U-17 World Cup, alongside other matches of the tournament.

topPlaces.name: Gour Kishore Ghosh metro station
topPlaces.description: Gour Kishore Ghosh is a upcoming metro station of the Orange Line of Kolkata Metro near Chingrighata crossing, Tangra at Sukanta Nagar in Bidhannagar. The station is named in honour of famous Bengali writer and journalist, Gour Kishore Ghosh.

items.note: S. N. Bose National Centre for Basic Sciences (SNBNCBS) is an autonomous research institute dedicated to basic research in basic sciences under the Department of Science and Technology of Government of India. It is located in West Bengal, Salt Lake, Kolkata.

itinerary.title: Day 2 — National Council of Science Museums & around

items.note: National Council of Science Museums (NCSM) is an autonomous scientific organization functioning under the Ministry of Culture, Government of India for science communication through its network of science museums or science centres spread across India. It is the largest chain of science centers/museums under a single administrative umbrella in the world.

Bidhannagar or Salt Lake City, is a planned city in North 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal and the main IT hub of Eastern India. It is a part of the city of Kolkata and is under the municipal administration of Bidhannagar Municipal Corporation (BMC).
Salt Lake Electronics Complex (or, Salt Lake Electronic City) (abbr. SALTLEC) is a technology hub in the Sector V of Bidhannagar, Kolkata in the Indian state of West Bengal.

The Salt Lake Stadium, Kolkata, also known as Vivekananda Yuba Bharati Krirangan (VYBK), is a multi-purpose stadium, used mostly for football matches, located in Salt Lake City, Greater Kolkata, with a capacity of 85,000 spectators. Named after Swami Vivekananda, the stadium is one of the home grounds of East Bengal FC and Mohun Bagan SG. The stadium hosted the final match of the 2017 FIFA U-17 World Cup, alongside other matches of the tournament.

Gour Kishore Ghosh is a upcoming metro station of the Orange Line of Kolkata Metro near Chingrighata crossing, Tangra at Sukanta Nagar in Bidhannagar. The station is named in honour of famous Bengali writer and journalist, Gour Kishore Ghosh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nicco Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nicco Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nicco Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (8 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nicco Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nicco Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nicco Park?
faq.a: Stays in Nicco Park start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nicco Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nalban metro station, The Chatterjee Group Centres for Research and Education in Science and Technology, S. N. Bose National Centre for Basic Sciences, National Council of Science Museums, Bidhannagar.
